sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check where the white pixel is now
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White pixel now: {n['boundary']}")

# Track all movements so far
print("\nMovement history:")
print(f"  Start: (45, 36)")
print(f"  After UP: (42, 36)")
print(f"  After RIGHT: need to check")

# Check blue cross bars
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        print(f"Blue bar id={n['id']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
